coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2: where champions are made when no one's watching. 75%, 85-100 rpm.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0% done. Your Garmin thinks you fell asleep. You're actually training. Allegedly.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75%, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/5. 16:48 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 90% FTP, Seated. 16:48. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 2/5. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 3 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/5. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/5. 90% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 41% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-100 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 41% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 41% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 4/5. 59% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 4 of 5. Target: 90% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 59% through. This is your workout. Own it. 90% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 59% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 59% into session. 90%, 85-100 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is easy because it's supposed to be. Don't make it harder. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 65-75% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Zone 2 is where fitness quietly accumulates. 21:36 of smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 21:36 at 75%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Conversational pace. 75% FTP. Save your matches for the hard days.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 91% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 109min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 109 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 109 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
